# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

jmx:
  port: 9999
  host: 0.0.0.0
  authentication:
    enabled: false
kafka:
  jmx:
    port: 9999
    host: 0.0.0.0
    authentication:
      enabled: false
  config:
    - name: JMX_PORT
      value: "9999"
    - name: KAFKA_JMX_OPTS
      value: "-Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.port=9999 -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.host=0.0.0.0 -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.authenticate=false -Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.ssl=false"
